file_insights.changes: Added ZellijWebButton UI component with accompanying color palette
specific_modifications: Added two new color properties: `webBg` (Color with RGB 0.60, 0.45, 0.85) and `webText` (white)
Added computed property `zellijWebURL` that returns optional URL to http://127.0.0.1:8082/<session>
Added conditional Link button rendering with globe icon, 'Web' label, and rounded rectangle styling
Button placed after existing 'Attach zellij session' button in UI hierarchy

patterns_discovered.context: Color palette extending Color type with semantic names (webBg, webText)
Guard checks both `isRunning` and `meta?.zellijSession` before exposing button
patterns_discovered.safety_level: High - prevents button visibility during invalid states

patterns_discovered.context: HStack with system image, Text, padding, background, and clipShape applied in sequence
patterns_discovered.reusability: Consistent with existing button implementations (attach, stop)

gotchas_discovered.risk: Assumes Zellij web server running on 127.0.0.1:8082; no validation or fallback
gotchas_discovered.impact: Link click will fail silently if server unavailable

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Double guard requirement for button visibility
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Correct design but increases cognitive load when reading condition

gotchas_discovered.risk: Invalid session names in metadata pass through to URL construction unvalidated
gotchas_discovered.impact: Malformed URLs possible if upstream data corrupted

approach_details.strategy: Direct UI component addition with color palette extension
approach_details.integration: Component integrated into existing button layout with semantic color theming

recommendations.recommendation: Document port 8082 as external dependency requirement in README or code comment
recommendations.rationale: Hardcoded port is not self-documenting; developers need to know Zellij web server must be running on this port

recommendations.recommendation: Add URL validation before constructing link to catch malformed session names
recommendations.rationale: Defensive programming against upstream data corruption

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding keyboard shortcut (e.g., Cmd+W) to open web interface
recommendations.rationale: Improves accessibility for power users; consistent with other quick-action patterns in macOS apps

recommendations.recommendation: Extract magic string '8082' to named constant at file or project level
recommendations.rationale: Single source of truth for port configuration; eases future port changes
